label: Raid age restriction
description: Defines an age-based restriction that can be applied to raids (e.g. adults only, children only). Factions can disallow certain age restriction types via disallowedRaidAgeRestrictions.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# RaidAgeRestrictionWorker subclass that determines eligibility and applies effects for this age restriction.

developmentStage.label: Development stage
developmentStage.description: Single DevelopmentalStage value this restriction applies to.

ageRange.label: Age range
ageRange.description: Optional FloatRange of pawn ages this restriction applies to. Written as min~max. Unset means no age range restriction.

threatPointsFactor.label: Threat points factor
threatPointsFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the raid's threat points when this restriction is active.

earliestDay.label: Earliest day
earliestDay.description: Days passed since settling before this restriction becomes eligible.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Chance that this restriction is selected when eligible.

arrivalTextExtra.label: Arrival text extra
arrivalTextExtra.description: Extra letter/arrival text appended when this restriction applies.

basic-raid-age-restriction.label: Basic raid age restriction
basic-raid-age-restriction.description: Raid age restriction with worker class, development stage, age range, threat points factor, earliest day, and chance.
